provider: HKUST 2025/26 BSc in Ocean Science and Technology Major Requirements
note: The official Major Requirements apply to students admitted in 2025-26 and publish 52 unique coded courses across the Major prerequisites, Required courses, capstone alternatives, Major Electives, IRE Track and two optional Options. The 12-credit Major Elective requirement includes a bounded list plus an open pool of any OCES course at 3000- or 4000-level; the open pool is retained as a rule and is not expanded into a fabricated permanent course list. Students may graduate without an Option. Students choosing the Marine Ecology or Oceanography Option must complete all of that Option's requirements in addition to the Major requirements, and courses used for an IRE Track or Option requirement may not also count toward Major Electives. IRE Track students must use SCIE3500 and SCIE4500 for the capstone, take LANG3027 instead of LANG4010, and, with Programme Office approval, complete either the Marine Ecology or Oceanography Option. University Common Core and School requirements are outside this Major-local supplement, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision. Recommended Year and Semester are assigned only to code-specific placements printed in the official example pathway; aggregate choice and elective slots are not inferred onto individual courses.
